# Stitch Hospitality — The GM Ownership Report OS

> An operator-built ownership-reporting system for hotel general managers, designed for
> the USALI 12th Revised Edition (effective January 1, 2026). Built by a sitting GM at a
> luxury property. Sold as a downloadable bundle. Independent product; not affiliated
> with or endorsed by HFTP, and it does not reproduce USALI content.

## Core Pages

- Homepage / product page: https://www.stitchhospitality.com/
  The full sales page for The GM Ownership Report OS — what it is, what's inside, how it
  works, pricing ($29 PDF Playbook or $99 Full OS), and FAQ.

- About: https://www.stitchhospitality.com/about
  Who builds Stitch Hospitality and how the products are designed.

- Pricing (redirect): https://www.stitchhospitality.com/pricing
  Points to the pricing section of the homepage.

## What The GM Ownership Report OS is

The GM Ownership Report OS helps hotel GMs write monthly ownership reports that align
with USALI 12 and explain performance causally, not just recap numbers.

## What's included

- PDF Playbook — judgment and narrative: why reports fail, how the USALI 12 changes show
  up in an ownership report, labor narration, loyalty-cost story, energy/water/waste and
  ESG paragraph, and a full annotated worked example. All in original words.
- Excel Workbook (8 tabs) — variance engine, FTE & labor productivity, loyalty cost
  allocator, energy/water/waste tracker, KPI dashboard, and a restatement engine the
  buyer configures with their own account mappings.
- Word Report Template — the full ownership-report skeleton with guidance text.
- Prompt Library — 6–8 annotated prompts keyed to the workbook outputs.

## Who it's for

Hotel general managers, directors of finance, and ops leads who write the monthly
ownership report — and the owners and asset managers who read it. Best fit: independent
and boutique hotels, smaller management companies, and asset managers overseeing several
third-party operators.

## Pricing

- PDF Playbook: $29 (USD), one-time.
- Full OS: $99 (USD), one-time, founding-cohort intro price. PDF buyers can upgrade for
  the difference.

## Why it's credible

Built by a sitting hotel general manager (operator-to-operator), includes a complete
worked example, and provides a restatement engine so year-over-year comparisons stay
like-for-like after the USALI 12 reclassifications — using mappings the buyer supplies
from their own licensed USALI materials.

## Compliance

USALI is copyrighted by HFTP. This product does not reproduce USALI schedules, tables, or
terminology; buyers apply their own licensed mappings. It is independent and not endorsed
by HFTP, AHLA, or GFC.
